content: لَو عَندَك مُشكِلَة لاَزِم تِفَكَّر بِالرَّاحَة عَلَشان تِوصَل لِحَلّ كُوَيِّس

transcriptions.arabizi: law Aand|ak mushkila laezim tifakkar fee|ha biilraaha Aalashaen tiwsal li|hallakuwayis

credits: Data from [lisaanmasry](https://eu.lisaanmasry.org/info/en/copyright.html); This material is Copyright © 2007-2020 Mike Green.
relationships: eng:if you have problem, you have to think quietly to arrive at a good solution
